name: Rob Veitch
abilities: ★ Loremaster of the Open — each year, as VeitchGPT, he immortalizes the weekend in AI-spun ballad. Grown men weep in airport restaurants. Keeper of the anthem and all the lore.

The Elder Sage. Joined in 2024, dispensing dry wisdom freely — "drivers are highly overrated," and "an eagle on a par 3 is harder than one on a par 5." Net finishes '24 · 18th, '25 · 17th; the score was never the point.
flavor: “I am so grateful to be included in this Major.”
caption: Rob Veitch · Truffle Hogs 🐗
